prompt: Write a description for Tesuque Death March. Key points: point-to-point requiring car shuttle, starts at Aspen Basin, climbs to Tesuque Peak via radio towers, 4800ft descent to Tesuque village, 9 miles, upper section exposed and technical, snow until June, lower canyon section through Tesuque Creek is beautiful with wildflowers in July, brutal on quads, name says it all

assertions.description: The description earns/justifies the 'Death March' name rather than softening it
Captures the arc: brutal upper section → beautiful lower canyon payoff
Mentions the car shuttle requirement as a practical necessity
Uses sensory or physical detail (quads, creek, wildflowers, snow, etc.) rather than vague adjectives
Does NOT start with a generic opener like 'Nestled in...' or 'If you're looking for...'
